ValidationRule.description: Rule that will mandate one of the following data fields is provided in order to set an account to POC Details provided: Last Payment date and amount Or, Acknowledgement date Or, Account Open date
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Canadian_Tire_Insolvency_Account', ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, 'PoC Details Provided'), AND(OR(ISBLANK(Last_Payment_Amount__c), ISBLANK(Last_Payment_Date__c)), ISBLANK(Acknowledgement_date__c), ISBLANK(Account_Open_date__c), ISBLANK(Judgement_Date__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Last Payment date and amount or Acknowledgement date or Account Open date or Judgement date are mandatory to set account as POC details provided
